source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dataflow_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Dataflow_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dataflow_Name_validate' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Dataflow_Name_validate,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Pipeline_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Pipeline_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_Container_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Src_Container_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_filename_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Src_filename,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_path_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Src_path_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_Container_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Tgt_Container_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_filename_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Tgt_filename,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_path_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Tgt_path_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Table_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Tgt_Table_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Schema_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Tgt_Schema_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_Container_Name_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Src_Container_Name_2,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_filename_Name_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Src_filename_2,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_path_Name_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Src_path_Name_2,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_Container_Name_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Tgt_Container_Name_2,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_filename_Name_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Tgt_filename_2,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_path_Name_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Tgt_path_Name_2,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Table_Name_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Tgt_Table_Name_2,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Schema_Name_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Tgt_Schema_Name_2,
	(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Lkp_Container_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Lkp_Container_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Lkp_filename_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Lkp_filename,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Lkp_path_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Lkp_path_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Lkp_Table_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Lkp_Table_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Lkp_Schema_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Server_Relationship_View' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow_Task') AS Lkp_Schema_Name,
	
;
